Name: FNavAgentProperties
Description: Properties of representation of an 'agent' (or Pawn) used by AI navigationpathfinding.

Variables.Name: AgentRadius
Variables.Description: Radius of the capsule used for navigationpathfinding.

Variables.Name: AgentHeight
Variables.Description: Total height of the capsule used for navigationpathfinding.

Variables.Name: AgentStepHeight
Variables.Description: Step height to use, or -1 for default value from navdata's config.

Variables.Name: NavWalkingSearchHeightScale
Variables.Description: Scale factor to apply to height of bounds when searching for navmesh to project to when nav walking

Variables.Name: PreferredNavData
Variables.Description: Type of navigation data used by agent, null means "any"
